queue.description: npm install next-intl, create i18n/request.ts, i18n/routing.ts

Create messages/en.json with all namespaces: common, nav, home, footer, auth, dashboard, marketplace, local, jobs, contact, faq, pricing, becomeSeller, errors
Create messages/nl.json — full Dutch translation of en.json
Update src/app/layout.js — wrap with NextIntlClientProvider, dynamic lang attribute
Verify dev server starts, translations load, no errors
